channel.title: Policy on VENANT 🐦
channel.description: Recent content in Policy on VENANT 🐦

item.title: The Speed of Clarification: Information as a Defensive Asset
item.description:
In March 2026, a rumor regarding a Rp17 trillion commitment to the Board of Peace (BoP) triggered a rapid response from the Indonesian presidency. Within minutes, official rebuttals flooded the digital space. This was not traditional bureaucracy; it was a calculated informational strike.

In the current era, political stability depends on the ability to neutralize viral speculation. Governments operate against a backdrop of deep-seated public skepticism. When trust is fragile, silence is interpreted as confirmation of incompetence or corruption. Speed is the only viable defense.
